nasb.text: and has gone and served other gods and worshiped them, or the sun or the moon or any of the heavenly host, which I have not commanded,

esv.text: and has gone and served other gods and worshiped them, or the sun or the moon or any of the host of heaven, which I have forbidden,

cnv.text: 去事奉別的神，並且敬拜它們，敬拜太陽或月亮，或任何天象，是我耶和華沒有吩咐的；

ccb.text: 不遵守祂的禁令，去供奉和祭拜其他神明，祭拜日、月或星辰，
